summary: First-iteration full test of ROOMIE PWA architecture. Backend health endpoints (/api/, /api/health) verified via pytest (3/3 PASS). Frontend exercised end-to-end with Playwright covering landing, i18n, demo login/signup, role routing (client/salon_owner/admin), protected-route gating, unauthorized redirects, all 11 sub-routes, Google OAuth demo flow, logout from both sidebar (desktop) and topbar (mobile), and mobile responsive (390x844) bottom nav + menu drawer. All 33 functional checks pass.

issues: React console warning: `Warning: React does not recognize the testId prop on a DOM element. ... spell it as lowercase testid instead.` Originates from the GlassCard component spreading a camelCased `testId` prop straight onto a <div>. Functional impact: none, but it pollutes the console on every glass card render. Fix: in components/GlassCard.jsx, accept `testId` and forward it as `data-testid={testId}` instead of spreading it, OR rename the prop to `testid`.
React Router future-flag warnings (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath). Cosmetic only — can be silenced by passing the future flags to <BrowserRouter>.

action_items: Fix GlassCard prop forwarding so `testId` is rendered as `data-testid` (or filter the prop out of DOM spread) — eliminates a repeated React warning visible on every page.
Optional: opt-in to React Router v7 future flags to silence the two startup warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: GlassCard leaks a non-standard camelCase `testId` attribute to the DOM (React warning on every render). Either rename to `data-testid` or whitelist allowed props before spreading.
Backend stub is intentionally minimal — fine as per spec. No DB layer needed.
supabase.js demo fallback is well-isolated and the seeded users + emitAuthChange contract correctly mirror real Supabase. Good design.
ProtectedRoute correctly gates by role and preserves intended target via location.state.from; works as expected.
Login.jsx redirect logic uses `location.state?.from` first which is correct for return-to-target after auth, and falls back to role-based default.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (33/33 functional checks across landing, i18n, login, signup, 3 role redirects, 2 cross-role blocks, 3 unauth redirects, 11 sub-route navigations, sidebar logout, topbar logout, Google OAuth demo, mobile bottom-nav, mobile menu button)

test_credentials: cliente@roomie.demo / salon@roomie.demo / admin@roomie.demo — all password Roomie2026! (auto-seeded by /app/frontend/src/lib/supabase.js buildDemoClient on first load).
seed_data_creation: None created on backend. Frontend localStorage demo users are auto-seeded by the app itself. Test-created users use TEST_ email prefix and live only in browser localStorage (cleared between flows).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All architecture checks for iteration 1 pass. The only remaining cleanup is the GlassCard `testId`->`data-testid` prop fix to remove the recurring React warning. Backend has no business endpoints by design — do not test data CRUD. When Supabase keys are wired into /app/frontend/.env, the demo banner (data-testid='demo-notice') will disappear and OAuth will redirect off-domain; tests for those should be adjusted accordingly.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Only a non-blocking React DOM-attribute warning caused by spreading a camelCase `testId` prop onto a <div> inside GlassCard.
